summary_one_line_zh: 专用模型、低延迟生成与隐私监管同时收紧
summary_one_line_en: Specialized models, faster generation, and privacy enforcement all shifted.

items.why_zh: 翻译模型开始逼近可替换生产API的质量/成本点，适合域内术语与长尾语言场景。
items.why_en: Translation quality-cost is nearing API-replacement territory, especially for domain terminology and long-tail languages.
items.so_what_zh: 用你们的术语集和回译集跑一轮 A/B，测一致性、延迟和单价。
items.so_what_en: A/B it on your terminology set and back-translations; measure consistency, latency, and cost.

items.why_zh: 如果文本生成走向并行/扩散范式，现有解码、缓存和吞吐优化假设都要重算。
items.why_en: A parallel/diffusion generation path would reset assumptions behind decoding, caching, and throughput tuning.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们最低延迟路径的瓶颈拆开，评估是否值得试验非自回归解码。
items.so_what_en: Break down your low-latency path and test whether non-autoregressive decoding is worth piloting.

items.why_zh: 语音/客服/广告链路里的采集与推断声明，已从合规边角变成直接执法风险。
items.why_en: Claims around voice capture and inference are now direct enforcement risk, not just compliance paperwork.
items.so_what_zh: 审一遍语音数据流、同意文案和供应商条款，删掉任何模糊的监听表述。
items.so_what_en: Audit voice flows, consent copy, and vendor terms; remove any vague listening claims.
